display.purpose: Hero headline only, always uppercase black-weight.

headline.purpose: Section titles, card titles, modal headings, uppercase.

body.purpose: UI copy, descriptions, button labels, sentence case.

label.purpose: Badges, stickers, metadata, form labels, mono uppercase.

shadows.name: hard
shadows.purpose: Default resting elevation for cards, modals, header/footer.

shadows.name: hard-sm
shadows.purpose: Buttons, badges, icon boxes, drawer items.

shadows.name: hard-hover
shadows.purpose: Card hover state, paired with translate-y(-2px).

motion.name: ease-standard
motion.purpose: Default fast (0.1-0.2s) transition for hover/press shadow and transform changes.

motion.name: duration-base
motion.purpose: Card hover lift, drawer/modal open-close transitions.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: Main CTA button, e.g. "Explora nuestro blog".
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 0.5rem; padding: 0.75rem 1.5rem; border: 2px solid #002201; border-radius: 8px; box-shadow: 4px 4px 0px 0px #002201; font-family: 'Bricolage Grotesque Variable', sans-serif; font-weight: 900; text-transform: uppercase; background-color: #0f5238; color: #ffffff; text-decoration: none; transition: transform 0.1s ease, box-shadow 0.1s ease; } .ds-btn-primary:hover { transform: translate(2px, 2px); box-shadow: 2px 2px 0px 0px #002201; } .ds-btn-primary:active { transform: translate(4px, 4px); box-shadow: 0px 0px 0px 0px #002201; } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: 3px solid #2d6a4f; outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Sticker Badge
components.description: Die-cut sticker label used for tags, categories, and status callouts.
components.css: .ds-badge-sticker { display: inline-block; font-family: 'Space Mono', monospace; font-size: 0.75rem; font-weight: bold; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.05em; border: 3px solid #002201; border-radius: 0; box-shadow: 4px 4px 0px 0px #002201; padding: 0.25rem 0.75rem; background-color: #ffffff; color: #002201; }

components.name: Category Card
components.description: Homepage category tile with icon, title, description, and sticker badge footer.
components.html:
🦠

Manual de inicio

Aprende a configurar tu vermicompostera ideal.

BASICO
components.css: .ds-category-card { display: block; background: #f2dfd0; border: 4px solid #002201; border-radius: 30px 50px 20px 40px; padding: 1.5rem; box-shadow: 6px 6px 0px 0px #002201; text-decoration: none; color: #002201; transition: transform 0.2s ease, box-shadow 0.2s ease; transform: rotate(1deg); } .ds-category-card:hover { transform: translateY(-8px) rotate(1deg); box-shadow: 8px 8px 0px 0px #002201; } .ds-category-card__icon { display: inline-block; background: #ecffe2; border: 2px solid #002201; padding: 0.75rem; margin-bottom: 1rem; box-shadow: 2px 2px 0px 0px #002201; } .ds-category-card__title { font-family: 'Bricolage Grotesque Variable', sans-serif; font-weight: 900; font-size: 1.5rem; text-transform: uppercase; margin: 0 0 0.5rem; } .ds-category-card__desc { font-family: 'Fira Sans', sans-serif; font-size: 1rem; color: #404943; margin: 0 0 1rem; }

components.name: Blog Card
components.description: Blog post preview card with category tag, date, title, description, and difficulty footer.
components.html:
MANUAL10 jul 2026

Comienza a vermicompostar en casa

Aprende a reciclar tus residuos de cocina con lombrices californianas.

5 minBásico
components.css: .ds-blog-card { border: 4px solid #002201; border-radius: 4px 16px 8px 24px; box-shadow: 6px 6px 0px 0px #002201; padding: 1.5rem; background: #ecffe2; transition: box-shadow 0.2s ease, transform 0.2s ease; } .ds-blog-card:hover { transform: scale(1.02); box-shadow: 8px 8px 0px 0px #002201; } .ds-blog-card__meta { display: flex; justify-content: space-between; margin-bottom: 1rem; font-family: 'Space Mono', monospace; font-size: 10px; font-weight: bold; } .ds-blog-card__tag { border: 2px solid #002201; padding: 0.125rem 0.5rem; box-shadow: 2px 2px 0px 0px #002201; } .ds-blog-card__title { font-family: 'Bricolage Grotesque Variable', sans-serif; font-weight: 900; font-size: 1.25rem; text-transform: uppercase; margin: 0 0 0.5rem; } .ds-blog-card__desc { font-family: 'Fira Sans', sans-serif; font-size: 0.875rem; color: rgba(0,34,1,0.9); margin: 0 0 1rem; } .ds-blog-card__footer { display: flex; justify-content: space-between; border-top: 2px dashed #002201; padding-top: 0.75rem; font-family: 'Space Mono', monospace; font-size: 0.75rem; }

components.name: Search Input
components.description: Pill-shaped search field for the compostable-food lookup widget.
components.css: .ds-search-input { position: relative; display: flex; align-items: center; border: 4px solid #002201; border-radius: 9999px; background: #ecffe2; overflow: hidden; } .ds-search-input__icon { position: absolute; left: 1rem; width: 24px; height: 24px; } .ds-search-input__field { width: 100%; border: none; background: transparent; padding: 1rem 1rem 1rem 3.5rem; font-family: 'Bricolage Grotesque Variable', sans-serif; font-size: 1.25rem; color: #002201; } .ds-search-input__field:focus { outline: none; } .ds-search-input:focus-within { box-shadow: 0 0 0 4px #2d6a4f; border-color: #0f5238; }

narrative.overview:
vermi.cl looks like a handcrafted scrapbook a knowledgeable friend put together on their kitchen table: chunky ink-black borders, hard sticker-paper shadows, and asymmetric organic corners, all slightly off-kilter, like a page taped in at a jaunty angle. It pairs a loud, no-blur brutalist construction (thick borders, offset hard shadows, uppercase black display type) with a soft, spring-green nature palette and rounded, uneven corners — brutalism's confidence without brutalism's coldness. Every surface reads as cut from paper and stuck down by hand, never as a glowing, floating SaaS panel.

This system explicitly rejects the sterile corporate eco-brand look (muted sage-and-cream palettes, stock nature photography, soft ambient shadows), the academic/scientific-journal look (dense, dry, personality-free layouts), and the generic AI-template landing page (gradient text, tiny tracked eyebrows on every section, hero-metric blocks). Where those systems soften and recede, vermi.cl commits: hard black outlines, saturated spring green, and playful rotation on nearly every card and badge.
keyCharacteristics: Thick, uniform black ink borders (#002201) around nearly every contained element
Hard offset shadows with zero blur, evoking a paper cutout stuck slightly proud of the page
Asymmetric, organic border-radius values instead of uniform rounded corners
Small rotation (rotate-1 to rotate-[-3deg]) applied to cards, badges, and stickers for a hand-placed feel
Uppercase, black-weight display type for headlines; monospace for labels, badges, and metadata

rules.name: The One-Ink Rule
rules.body: Every border, hard shadow, and outline in the system is #002201 (Deep Forest Ink) — never a lighter gray or the brand green. This single consistent ink color is what makes disparate colored surfaces read as one cohesive scrapbook.

rules.name: The Shout-Then-Explain Rule
rules.body: Headlines are always uppercase and black-weight; body text is always sentence case and regular weight. Never mix the two — a headline in sentence case or body text in caps breaks the zine's cover-vs-caption logic.

rules.name: The Flatten-On-Press Rule
rules.body: Every interactive hard-shadow element must animate its shadow toward 0 0 0 0 and translate by the exact shadow offset on :active. A button that only changes color on press, without flattening its shadow, breaks the paper-cutout illusion.

dos: Do use Deep Forest Ink (#002201) for every hard border and hard shadow — never substitute a lighter gray or a brand color.
Do apply small, varied rotation (rotate-1 to rotate-[-3deg]) to cards, badges, and stickers so the layout reads as hand-placed, not grid-perfect.
Do use asymmetric organic border-radius values instead of a single uniform corner radius.
Do flatten an element's shadow to 0 0 0 0 and translate it by the shadow's offset on :active, so presses feel physically real.
Do keep headlines uppercase/black-weight and body copy sentence-case/regular — the contrast is the hierarchy.
Do use the spring-green (#ecffe2) surface as a committed, saturated background choice, not a muted neutral.
donts: Don't build a corporate or clinical eco-brand look: no muted sage-and-cream palette, no stock nature photography, no soft ambient drop-shadows standing in for the hard-shadow system.
Don't produce an academic/scientific-journal layout: no dense, dry, personality-free type blocks with no rotation, stickers, or organic shape.
Don't reach for generic AI-template landing-page patterns: no gradient text, no tiny tracked uppercase eyebrows above every section, no hero-metric/stat-tile blocks.
Don't use a soft blurred box-shadow anywhere; every shadow in this system is a hard, zero-blur offset.
Don't use a uniform border-radius on a primary card, button, or badge — always reach for one of the organic/brutalism radius values first.
Don't leave a hard-shadow element static on hover/press; a card or button that never lifts or flattens looks broken, not restrained.
